events: Death King fights zombie that uses Hadouken in pit
Heavenly Demon is disappointed Death King has never starved more than 3 days
Death King dies and loops back 24 hours
Death King decides to starve himself for 112 days using time loops
He isolates himself on snowy mountain to fast
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (first form - Sword of Starvation)
I Want To Become Just Like You
deaths: Death King (killed by zombie in pit)
loops: Death King loops back 24 hours after dying in pit
cause_effect: Heavenly Demon's traditional teaching methods require genuine understanding of suffering
Death King realizes he needs to truly experience starvation to learn the demonic art
Plans to use suicide loops to maintain peak hunger state for 112 days
chapters.notes: Death King reveals he has burned to death before. He plans to repeat the 15th day of starvation to maintain maximum hunger. Bae Hu-ryeong is deeply worried about this method.

events: Death King fasts for a week and practices swordsmanship
He realizes hunger is not just absence of food but wanting to eat but being unable
He imagines a starving farmer hitting his child and giving bark to eat
Finally grasps the Sword of Starvation concept
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art - First Form: Sword of Starvation
cause_effect: Through imagination and empathy, Death King understands hunger as emotional pain
The demonic art requires experiencing memories of suffering, not just physical deprivation
Bae Hu-ryeong notes Death King has become a Righteous Sect master using Demonic Cult arts
chapters.notes: The Sword of Starvation is born from the imagery of a farmer in famine hitting his child and then regretting it.

events: Death King summons Preta and skeleton army
Preta reports on her life in the village on 20th floor
Death King orders Preta to collect 112 corpses of people who died from hunger
He experiences their traumas through his skill
He eats mud cookies he made himself
skills: I Want To Become Just Like You (trauma absorption)
deaths: Death King (multiple deaths to absorb 112 traumas)
Various unnamed people (fisherman, town leader, children - traumas reenacted)
loops: Multiple 24-hour loops to experience all 112 deaths
cause_effect: Experiencing 112 hunger deaths gives Death King deep understanding of starvation
He makes and eats mud cookies (togwa) to fully understand the trauma
Returns to Heavenly Demon ready to demonstrate true Sword of Starvation
chapters.notes: Preta has been living well in the village. Death King plans to build a pharmacy for the Alchemist there. The trauma experiences include children making mud cookies.

events: Death King demonstrates perfected Sword of Starvation in pit
Heavenly Demon is shocked and accepts him as disciple
She reveals there are 9 swords in Infernal Heavens Demonic Art
Murim Lord takes Venomous Snake as his disciple
Death King and Venomous Snake become proxies for Great Battle of Good and Evil
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art - First Form: Sword of Starvation (mastered)
deaths: Death King (killed by stronger zombie when learning thirst)
loops: Death King loops back after dying to thirst-zombie
cause_effect: Heavenly Demon's favorability reaches 51, she considers him a disciple in her heart
Murim Lord takes Venomous Snake as disciple so Heavenly Demon won't feel guilty
The two disciples will carry on the war between their masters
chapters.notes: Bae Hu-ryeong is intensely jealous and wants to fight the Heavenly Demon. The Ceremony of Nine Salutes is the master-disciple ritual.

events: Heavenly Demon explains the core of demonic arts: memory is a sense
She uses apple metaphor to explain how emotions shape martial arts
Death King demonstrates Sword of Starvation, Thirst, Drowning, and Freezing
He gathered 293 deaths total to master four forms
Murim Lord reveals he took Venomous Snake as disciple to give Heavenly Demon freedom
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (First through Fourth Forms)
cause_effect: Heavenly Demon realizes Death King is diverse and rich in different tendencies
The apple metaphor shows that personal memories define one's martial arts
Murim Lord and Heavenly Demon's rivalry is actually mutual respect
chapters.notes: The four stages of Demonic Cult: ipma (rising demon), gukma (extreme demon), talma (elusive demon), sinma (demonic god). Death King experiences 293 deaths in one day of training.

events: Death King fights Venomous Snake as proxy for Great Battle of Good and Evil
Both masters shout advice during the fight
The battle is intense but neither intends to kill
Death King formally asks to become Heavenly Demon's disciple
Heavenly Demon accepts and gives him the Ceremony of Nine Salutes
cause_effect: The spar proves Death King is worthy of being Heavenly Demon's proxy
Murim Lord and Heavenly Demon both want to give each other a future through disciples
The fight represents the continuation of their war through the next generation
chapters.notes: The fight is described as a dream that doesn't discolor. Both sides are smiling and laughing despite the violence. This is the true nature of their rivalry.

events: Flashback: Young So Baek-hyang leaves Demonic Cult at 21 to enter Murim world
Present: Ceremony of Nine Salutes in secret library (Cheonmugwan)
Death King must bow with different heart each time - hunger, thirst, drowning, freezing
He fails repeatedly on poison (336 times), illness (189 times), blunt impact (510 times)
Bae Hu-ryeong promises to fulfill his lost bet by giving Heavenly Demon a match
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (all nine forms concept introduced)
cause_effect: The ceremony requires genuine emotional understanding of each form of death
Death King's 4090 suicides are revealed as his ninth form - death by his own hand
Heavenly Demon finally accepts him as her true disciple
chapters.notes: Cheonmugwan contains martial arts from all sects stolen by Heavenly Demon. The ninth form is personalized - each leader engraves their own death. Death King uses his suicide trauma.

events: Alchemist successfully develops cure for zombie virus
However, cure requires surgery to remove infected lower abdomen chi centers
Murim Lord undergoes surgery first and survives but loses all chi
Heavenly Demon will also lose her martial arts if she undergoes surgery
She demonstrates her power by cutting a snowy mountain peak
skills: Heavenly Demon's final chi demonstration (mountain-cutting strike)
cause_effect: The cure works but permanently removes martial arts ability
Murim Lord accepts this as the price of survival
Heavenly Demon decides to have the surgery after showing her final power
chapters.notes: The surgery removes the dantian (lower abdomen energy center). Without it, they cannot use chi but are free from the virus. Heavenly Demon's favorability is now 85.

events: Both masters recover from surgery over a week
Death King reveals he gathered 1998 zombies using Preta and skeleton army
He uses Hundred Ghosts Reincarnation to temporarily restore them
Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord realize they can have a true final battle
The 990th Battle of Good and Evil begins with 1000 fighters on each side
cause_effect: Death King prepared the true war both masters wanted but couldn't have
The restored zombies retain memories but cannot use chi
This is the proper ending - a real war between Demonic Cult and Righteous Sect
chapters.notes: The restored people include the Four Demon Lords and Shaolin head monk. This is the battle both sides always wanted - a true conclusion to their 990-day war.

characters: Four Demon Lords (Bloody Demon, Flame Ghost Demon, Demon Lord Wolyeong, Sword Demon)
events: The 990th Battle of Good and Evil rages - brutal hand-to-hand combat without chi
Heavenly Demon calls out her subordinates by name
Murim Lord reunites with Shaolin head monk
Both sides fight with pure will and martial arts principles
Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord prepare for their final duel
cause_effect: The battle is what both sides always wanted - a true conclusion
Without chi, the fight is raw and brutal but meaningful
Heavenly Demon declares she is the main seat of the Demonic Cult
chapters.notes: The battle is described as monochrome - only white snow and red blood. Both sides are fighting for their ideals, not just survival.

events: Heavenly Demon and Murim Lord duel using true chi (life force)
Their battle creates a temporary spring with peach blossoms
Heavenly Demon wins but spares Murim Lord's life
She is dying from using her true chi
Death King asks for a verbal match (battle of wits) with her
locations: Peach blossom field (created by their chi)
deaths: Heavenly Demon (dying from true chi exhaustion)
cause_effect: Using true chi burns their life force permanently
The peach blossoms are created from their spilled blood and chi
Heavenly Demon wants one final satisfying match before death
chapters.notes: True chi is innate life energy that cannot be recovered. The battle creates a beautiful but deadly scene. Bae Hu-ryeong will fight for Death King in the verbal match.

events: Flashback: Young Heavenly Demon abandons personal training to help people
Bae Hu-ryeong formally requests a verbal match with Heavenly Demon
The battle of wits begins - Bae Hu-ryeong yields first three moves
Heavenly Demon uses various techniques, Bae Hu-ryeong counters
Bae Hu-ryeong reveals he endured 130 years alone
cause_effect: The verbal match is between two masters at the peak of different worlds
Bae Hu-ryeong understands Heavenly Demon's sacrifice of personal power for her sect
The match is incomprehensible to Death King but beautiful in concept
chapters.notes: Heavenly Demon could have reached 'heart's sword' stage if she had 60 years to train. Instead she helped people. Bae Hu-ryeong recognizes her as a worthy rival.

events: The verbal match continues for two days
Heavenly Demon uses all nine forms of Infernal Heavens Demonic Art
Bae Hu-ryeong counters with his martial arts philosophy
Heavenly Demon completes her ninth form: Sword of Freezing (lonely death)
Bae Hu-ryeong uses Void Form - First Sword (unnamed)
Heavenly Demon realizes she is losing but is happy
locations: Snowfield (transformed into various seasons through their battle)
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art (all nine forms, especially ninth: Sword of Freezing)
Void Form - First Sword (Bae Hu-ryeong's ultimate technique)
cause_effect: The battle transforms the snowfield through seasons - starvation (winter), thirst (summer), drowning (monsoon), freezing (winter again)
Heavenly Demon's ninth form represents her lonely death in the snow
Bae Hu-ryeong's void form represents his 130 years of solitude
chapters.notes: The battle is described through poetic imagery of seasons and flowers. Red peonies, roses, lilies, and plum blossoms appear. Master's ninth form cuts the winter sky.

events: Heavenly Demon dies peacefully after the match
Death King inherits position as Young Master of Demonic Cult
The 22nd floor is cleared
Death King is transported back to Great Library
Librarian reveals he is a massive fan of Death King (favorability 95)
All other hunters are unconscious
deaths: Heavenly Demon (So Baek-hyang) - dies from true chi exhaustion
cause_effect: Heavenly Demon dies happy after experiencing the ultimate match
Death King becomes the successor but refuses the title of Heavenly Demon
Librarian's obsession reveals he sees Death King as the protagonist of his favorite story
chapters.notes: The Librarian tries to collect Death King's hair and nails as memorabilia. His name is revealed as Corner Librarian. Death King's contribution rank is #1.

events: Librarian reveals the truth about Apocalypses
The zombie virus was actually a curse from a dead Constellation - The Yellow Dragon
Lefanta Aegim (Constellation Killer) killed the Yellow Dragon
The sword in the dragon's corpse is Shiny's sister - Sword of Compassion
Death King absorbs the sister sword into Shiny
locations: Mountain peak with Yellow Dragon corpse
deaths: The Yellow Dragon (Constellation) - killed by Lefanta Aegim
cause_effect: Apocalypses occur when Constellations are killed, removing the world's protection
Lefanta Aegim is systematically killing Constellations across worlds
Death King has now saved two worlds destroyed by the Constellation Killer
chapters.notes: The Librarian explains he is only a reader, not a writer - he cannot intervene directly. The Yellow Dragon's corpse still moans in pain. This is the second sister sword collected.
